problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optical. Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
